\u00a76.title: 6. Worked example
\u00a76.notes: Narrative walkthrough; validated by acceptance scenarios in §15. v1.3.0 added 'Base-derived pre-fill' paragraph — PatternQuestion.default field is covered by §5 (no new contracts here).

\u00a77.title: 7. Strategy selection
\u00a77.notes: EXTRACTED to specs/007-strategy-selection/spec.md; spec.md body is a stub pointer (tracked hash is the stub). A1-A7 axis types + strategy catalog types present. Decision tree engine (§7.2) + S-01..S-12 selectors not yet built. v1.1.1 added §7.6 (corpus placement priors — seeder in utilities/kbgen, not yet a contracts type). v1.2.0 added §7.7 (scoped assignment map) — assignmentMap.ts implements the typed contract; SurveyPhaseResult.assignments? additive field already landed ahead of spec text.

\u00a78.title: 8. Data flow
\u00a78.notes: EXTRACTED to specs/008-data-flow/spec.md; spec.md body is a stub pointer (tracked hash is the stub). CharacterDiscovery + LinguistInventory types exist. Survey-to-pattern pipeline not yet wired. v1.1.1 added placement proposals (Phase B). v1.2.0/v1.3.0 added two-track working-copy spine (instantiateFromBase / instantiateFromExisting) — producedSet.ts and surveySession.ts implement those contracts. Engine pipeline not yet built.

\u00a79.title: 9. Three-group routing
\u00a79.notes: Gallery routing (supported / CJK+Ethiopic stub / legacy) not yet built. D5 governs CJK/Ethiopic out-of-scope stub. v1.2.0 added language/script decoupling — routing follows the chosen target script (BCP47 subtag from identity-lite), not the language's default script. v1.3.0 added Phase A CJK/Ethiopic detection gate detail.

\u00a710.title: 10. Validator and lint engine
\u00a710.notes: All three-layer interfaces typed. Layer A 9 TS-portable checks + 5 WASM-only not yet implemented. D3 governs 300ms debounce.

\u00a711.title: 11. criteria.md compliance
\u00a711.notes: Day-1 criteria catalog fully typed as Criterion[] with 148 entries (133 repo-hygiene + 12 DISCUS + 3 added post-v1.0: 1 from §7.7a KM_LINT_INVENTORY_UNCOVERED split, 2 import-output criteria). Loadable via ALL_CRITERIA / '/criteria' subpath. D4 governs the four-band enforcement model. Previously §11 was 'Virtual FS' — that content is now a subsection of §12.

\u00a712.title: 12. Output artifacts
\u00a712.notes: VirtualFS + OutputService + Scaffolder interfaces typed. ZIP and sidecar serialisation built in engine/src/output/; GitHub OAuth fork+PR built in engine/src/output/github.ts; buildImportAttributionBlock in engine/src/output/import-attribution.ts. D6 governs desktop-first scope; D9 covers IR-as-canonical-source for emit. v1.3.0 added working-copy spine (VirtualFS as persistent live edit target, Track 1/Track 2 instantiation, re-projected layers). Virtual FS content previously tracked as standalone §11 now lives here as a subsection.

\u00a713.notes: Governance: engine vs content team split. Informs package ownership, not runtime code.
